metadata.title: Anaemia screening (pregnant women)
metadata.description: Field anaemia risk screening for pregnant women using a haemoglobin value from an external test device, with an optional photo of the device reading.
metadata.disclaimer: Screening support only. Not a medical diagnosis. Follow programme guidance for care decisions.

reference.label: Anemia Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan guidelines, National Health Mission

input-step.help: Take the value from the digital haemoglobinometer. You can also attach a photo of the device display.

outcome-step.label: Severe anaemia risk: refer to the health facility today
outcome-step.advice: Escalate as per the severe anaemia protocol and record the referral.

outcome-step.label: Below the screening threshold: refer to the ANC clinic
outcome-step.advice: The reading is below the screening threshold for pregnancy. Refer for confirmation and management as per programme guidance.

outcome-step.label: Reading unclear: retake the measurement
outcome-step.advice: The screening check was not confident. Repeat the test or refer for confirmation.

outcome-step.label: Screening check unavailable: refer for manual review
outcome-step.advice: Complete the referral on paper if needed. Do not discard the reading.

outcome-step.label: At or above the screening threshold
outcome-step.advice: Share dietary advice and the next screening date as per programme guidance.
